{{Quote|I'm sure that Tak is going to ask me. Oh, he's so furry.|[[Latara/Legends|Latara]]|<ref name="The Raich">{{Ewoks|The Raich}}</ref>}}
'''Tak''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]. He was an eligible Ewok male and was sought after by many females in the village for his handsome fur. Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Tak was old enough to attend the [[Shadow Night Festival/Legends|Shadow Night Festival]]. Although the young Ewok [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] believed that Tak was sure to ask her to attend the festival alongside him, Tak seemed unaware of Latara's intentions. He instead asked the older daughter of [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]], [[Asha/Legends|Asha]], to go to the festival with him, which she accepted.
